Putin/Trump koennten EU-Energie weiter destabilisieren. Kein direkter US-Exposure, aber globale Gas-Preise beeinflussen Inflation (CPI-relevant).

SYNTHESE: Tail-Risk underpriced. Wenn Iran eskaliert (Strait of Hormuz Closure confirmed), VIX-Spike + Energy-Rally + Flight-to-Quality. V16 DD-Protect Trigger (-5% Drawdown) moeglich. Aktuelle Positionen (GLD 16.9%, DBC 20.3%) bieten Teil-Hedge, aber Equity-Exposure via XLU/XLP (33.2%) vulnerabel.

CPI entscheidet: Wenn hot, Fed bleibt hawkish, NFCI bleibt tight, SLOWDOWN vertieft, V16 Growth-Signal kippt. Wenn cool, Fed-Pivot moeglich, Yield Curve-Signal dominiert, LATE_EXPANSION bestaetigt. ## S5: INTELLIGENCE DIGEST

**Howell (Liquidity/Commodities Expertise):**
- Liquidity Momentum peaked Feb 2026, Wall Street flat seit late 2025 (Novelty 5). Fed policy haelt Maerkte steady, kein Upside-Katalysator (Novelty 7, Signal -6). Empfehlung: Cash-Allocation erhoehen (Novelty 5, Signal -5, POSITIONING). 
- China akkumuliert Gold systematisch (State + Private), Yuan Monetization treibt Gold-Preis, nicht Geopolitik (Novelty 6, Signal -3). Erklaert stabile US Treasury Term Premia trotz Volatilitaet (Novelty 7). Crypto-Schwaeche durch Kapitalfluesse zu Gold (Novelty 6).
- **CIO INTERPRETATION:** Howell's Liquidity-Peak-Claim stuetzt V16 Liq_Direction -1. Gold-Thesis (China-driven) erklaert GLD-Staerke unabhaengig von Geopolitik — wenn korrekt, GLD bleibt stabil auch wenn Iran-Krise abebbt. Cash-Empfehlung = Defensive Positioning, aligned mit V16 SELECTIVE (kein SPY/XLK).

**Forward Guidance (Macro/Geopolitik):**
- LNG-Disruption (Qatar offline seit 2. Maerz) systemischer als Oil-Shock, trifft AI Capex Costs (Novelty 7, Signal -7, ENERGY). Bonds sell off trotz Geopolitik = Vault-Kontrollverlust (Novelty 6, Signal -8, LIQUIDITY). 
- Geopolitik + Oil Rally + Fed hawkish = Carry Trade Unwind, Credit Spread Blowout wie 2008 (Novelty 5, Signal -6, FED_POLICY).
- Trump pumpt Liquidity/Markets durch 2026 Midterms, dann Crash post-election (Novelty 6, Political Timing).
- **CIO INTERPRETATION:** LNG-Thesis hochrelevant fuer CPI (Energy-Komponente). Wenn Qatar LNG 4+ Wochen offline (Doomberg bestaetigt), Gas-Preise steigen, CPI hot, Fed hawkish, Howell's "kein Upside" bestaetigt. Bond-Selloff-Anomalie (Safe-Haven-Failure) deutet auf strukturellen Liquidity-Stress — wenn korrekt, naechster Risk-Off-Event trifft Bonds UND Equities (kein Diversification). Carry Trade Unwind-Szenario = HYG-Risiko (siehe S3 CRITICAL Alert).

**Doomberg (Energy Expertise):**
- Qatar Ras Laffan LNG offline, Restart 4+ Wochen (2 Wochen Safety + 2 Wochen Ramp-up, Novelty 8, Signal -7). Qatar = 20% global LNG, Strait of Hormuz Closure = meaningful proportion inaccessible (Novelty 8, Signal -7).
- EU banned Russian pipeline gas (Autumn 2027) aber importiert Russian LNG bis Jan 2027 — Paradox, Abhaengigkeit bleibt (Novelty 5). Putin/Trump koennten EU weiter destabilisieren (Novelty 5).
- **CIO INTERPRETATION:** Doomberg's LNG-Timeline konkret (4 Wochen minimum) — wenn korrekt, Gas-Preise bleiben elevated bis April, CPI Energy-Komponente hot mindestens 1-2 Monate. EU-Paradox = geopolitisches Leverage fuer Putin/Trump, aber kein direkter US-Portfolio-Impact. DBC (Broad Commodities) profitiert von Energy-Tightness.

**ZeroHedge (Geopolitik/Contrarian):**
- Kurden-Proxy-Strategie gegen Iran gescheitert, US betrayed Kurden 9x historisch (Novelty 5). Iran militaerisch ueberlegen, mountainous terrain = Invasion prohibitively difficult (Novelty 5).
- US/Israel munitions shortage kritisch (7 Patriot batteries an Ukraine verloren, Novelty 5). Iran-Konflikt eskaliert unberechenbar, severe economic/geopolitical/kinetic consequences (Novelty 5, Signal -3, GEOPOLITICS).
- China resilient zu Oil-Shocks (Novelty 7). South Korea Won unter Druck, 1,500/USD critical (Novelty 5).
- **CIO INTERPRETATION:** ZeroHedge bias-adjusted (Doom-Bias -2), aber munitions-shortage-Claim faktisch (US Patriot transfers dokumentiert). Wenn US/Israel militaerisch overextended, Iran-Eskalation wahrscheinlicher (keine Abschreckung). China-Resilienz stuetzt Howell's China-Gold-Thesis (China hedged gegen Oil-Shock). South Korea Won-Stress = Asia FX-Contagion-Risiko, aber Market Analyst L4 (FX) zeigt noch keine Signale.

**Hidden Forces (Geopolitik):**
- Detailed historical analysis Reagan-era Lebanon (1982-1984), pattern: US escalation → provocation → attack → blame-shifting → no accountability (Novelty 5-7, Signal -7, GEOPOLITICS).
- **CIO INTERPRETATION:** Historical parallel zu current Iran-Strategie. Wenn korrekt, US-Eskalation → Iranian Retaliation → Blame Iran → weitere Eskalation. Relevanz: Geopolitik-Tail-Risk underpriced (siehe S4).

**Consensus-Synthese:**
GEOPOLITICS -4.85 (HIGH confidence, 4 sources) + ENERGY -6.0 (MEDIUM, 3 sources) + FED_POLICY -6.0 (MEDIUM, 2 sources) = bearish Cluster. LIQUIDITY -8.0 (LOW confidence, nur Howell) aber V16 Liq_Direction -1 bestaetigt unabhaengig. POSITIONING -5.57 (MEDIUM, Howell + Forward Guidance: Defensive Rotation). Keine bullish Consensus-Scores. IC-Richtung: Risk-Off, Defensive, Liquidity-Stress, Geopolitik-Underpriced.

ABER IC GEOPOLITICS -4.85 stuetzt GLD.

**Risiko-Exposition:**
HYG 27.7%: Credit Spread Risk. Wenn CPI hawkish → Fed bleibt tight → HYG-Spreads weiten. Forward Guidance Carry Trade Unwind-Szenario = HYG vulnerable. ABER: V16 LATE_EXPANSION Regime historisch performt in Credit (Backtest-validiert). Monitoring: HYG OAS, Post-CPI Spread-Bewegung.

DBC 21.2%: Commodity Demand Risk. Wenn Recession (L2 SLOWDOWN vertieft) → Demand-Destruction → DBC faellt. ABER: Geopolitik (Iran, Qatar LNG) = Supply-Shock → DBC rally. Zwei gegenlaeufe Kraefte. Monitoring: WTI, Natural Gas, Copper (Growth-Proxy).

XLU/XLP 33.2%: Rate-Sensitivity. Wenn CPI hot → Yields steigen → Utilities/Staples underperform (Duration-Risk). ABER: Defensive Rotation bei Risk-Off → XLU/XLP outperform vs. SPY. Trade-off: Rate-Risk vs. Defensive-Bid.

GLD 17.9%: Howell-Thesis (China-driven) = strukturell bullish. Geopolitik = zusaetzlicher Bid. Risiko: Wenn Fed-Pivot (CPI cool) → Real Yields sinken → GLD rally. Wenn Fed hawkish (CPI hot) → Real Yields steigen → GLD Druck. ABER: Howell's China-Thesis entkoppelt GLD von US Yields.

**Konzentrations-Check:**
Top-5 = 100% (nur 5 Positionen). HYG 27.7% + DBC 21.2% = 48.9% in 2 Assets. Effective Commodities (DBC + GLD) 37.2% (WARNING-Schwelle 35%). Keine Tech-Exposure (0%). Keine Equity-Beta. Konzentration = hoch, aber V16-Regime-bedingt (SELECTIVE = konzentrierte Bets). Risk Officer: Keine Concentration-WARNING ausser Commodities (siehe S3).

**F6-Kontext:**
UNAVAILABLE (V2). Wenn live: F6 Stock Picker wuerde Equity-Exposure hinzufuegen (SectorRarity + Heat), Covered Call Overlay = Income. Aktuelle V16-only-Portfolio = kein Equity-Alpha, kein Income-Layer. V2-Upgrade = Diversification + Alpha-Source.

**Szenario-Sensitivitaet:**
CPI hot (>Consensus): Fed hawkish → Yields up → HYG/XLU/XLP down, DBC/GLD mixed (Energy up, Metals down wegen Demand). V16 Regime-Shift zu RISK_OFF moeglich (Liq bleibt -1, Growth kippt). Portfolio-Drawdown -3% bis -5% (HYG/Defensives underperform). DD-Protect Trigger (-5%) proximity.

CPI cool (<Consensus): Fed-Pivot-Erwartung → Yields down → HYG/XLU/XLP up, GLD up (Real Yields down), DBC mixed (Energy down, Metals up wegen Growth). V16 bleibt SELECTIVE oder shiftet zu STEADY_GROWTH (Liq +1). Portfolio +2% bis +4%.

Geopolitik-Eskalation (Iran): VIX-Spike → Flight-to-Quality → GLD up, DBC (Energy) up, HYG down (Credit Spreads), XLU/XLP mixed (Defensive Bid vs. Rate-Spike). V16 DD-Protect moeglich. Portfolio -2% bis +3% (GLD/DBC offset HYG).

Recession (L2 SLOWDOWN vertieft): Risk-Off → HYG down, DBC down (Demand), XLU/XLP up (Defensive), GLD up (Safe Haven). V16 Regime-Shift zu RISK_OFF (alle Defensives + GLD, kein HYG/DBC). Portfolio rebalanced, Drawdown begrenzt.

GEOPOLITICS -4.85 (HIGH confidence, 4 sources) + ENERGY -6.0 (MEDIUM, 3 sources) + FED_POLICY -6.0 (MEDIUM, 2 sources) = bearish Cluster. LIQUIDITY -8.0 (LOW confidence, nur Howell) aber V16 Liq_Direction -1 bestaetigt unabhaengig. POSITIONING -5.57 (MEDIUM, Howell + Forward Guidance: Defensive Rotation). Keine bullish Consensus-Scores. IC-Richtung: Risk-Off, Defensive, Liquidity-Stress, Geopolitik-Underpriced.
section_texts.S6_portfolio:
PORTFOLIO CONTEXT

V16: 5 Positionen, 100% allokiert. HYG 27.7% (High Yield Credit), DBC 21.2% (Broad Commodities), XLU 18.2% (Utilities), GLD 17.9% (Gold), XLP 15.0% (Consumer Staples). Regime SELECTIVE (LATE_EXPANSION): Growth +1, Liq -1, Stress 0. Drawdown -1.11% (MaxDD -10.78%, Puffer 9.67pp). Performance YTD: CAGR 34.48%, Sharpe 2.74, Calmar 3.2.

**Positioning-Analyse:**
Defensive Tilt dominant: XLU + XLP = 33.2% (Defensives), HYG 27.7% (Credit), GLD 17.9% (Safe Haven), DBC 21.2% (Inflation Hedge). Kein Equity-Beta (SPY/XLK/XLF = 0%). V16-Logik: LATE_EXPANSION + negative Liquidity = Defensive Rotation, Credit bevorzugt ueber Equities, Commodities als Inflation-Hedge. 

**IC-Alignment:**
Howell (Cash-Empfehlung, Liquidity peaked) → V16 kein SPY = aligned. Forward Guidance (LNG-Disruption, Geopolitik) → DBC + GLD = aligned. Doomberg (Energy-Tightness) → DBC = aligned. IC POSITIONING -5.57 (Defensive) = V16 Positioning matched.

**Market Analyst Alignment:**
L2 (Macro) SLOWDOWN → V16 Defensives (XLU/XLP) = aligned. L3 (Earnings) HEALTHY (+5, Breadth 76%) → V16 kein SPY = NICHT aligned (Breadth bullish, aber V16 ignoriert weil Liquidity negativ dominiert). L6 (RV) WTI Curve bearish (-10) → DBC-Logik unklar (Curve Backwardation = Demand stark, aber Score bearish weil Contango-Erwartung). L8 (Tail Risk) CALM (+2) → V16 GLD 17.9% = over-hedged? ABER IC GEOPOLITICS -4.85 stuetzt GLD.

**Risiko-Exposition:**
HYG 27.7%: Credit Spread Risk. Wenn CPI hawkish → Fed bleibt tight → HYG-Spreads weiten. Forward Guidance Carry Trade Unwind-Szenario = HYG vulnerable. ABER: V16 LATE_EXPANSION Regime historisch performt in Credit (Backtest-validiert). Monitoring: HYG OAS, Post-CPI Spread-Bewegung.

DBC 21.2%: Commodity Demand Risk. Wenn Recession (L2 SLOWDOWN vertieft) → Demand-Destruction → DBC faellt. ABER: Geopolitik (Iran, Qatar LNG) = Supply-Shock → DBC rally. Zwei gegenlaeufe Kraefte. Monitoring: WTI, Natural Gas, Copper (Growth-Proxy).

XLU/XLP 33.2%: Rate-Sensitivity. Wenn CPI hot → Yields steigen → Utilities/Staples underperform (Duration-Risk). ABER: Defensive Rotation bei Risk-Off → XLU/XLP outperform vs. SPY. Trade-off: Rate-Risk vs. Defensive-Bid.

GLD 17.9%: Howell-Thesis (China-driven) = strukturell bullish. Geopolitik = zusaetzlicher Bid. Risiko: Wenn Fed-Pivot (CPI cool) → Real Yields sinken → GLD rally. Wenn Fed hawkish (CPI hot) → Real Yields steigen → GLD Druck. ABER: Howell's China-Thesis entkoppelt GLD von US Yields.

**Konzentrations-Check:**
Top-5 = 100% (nur 5 Positionen). HYG 27.7% + DBC 21.2% = 48.9% in 2 Assets. Effective Commodities (DBC + GLD) 37.2% (WARNING-Schwelle 35%). Keine Tech-Exposure (0%). Keine Equity-Beta. Konzentration = hoch, aber V16-Regime-bedingt (SELECTIVE = konzentrierte Bets). Risk Officer: Keine Concentration-WARNING ausser Commodities (siehe S3).

**F6-Kontext:**
UNAVAILABLE (V2). Wenn live: F6 Stock Picker wuerde Equity-Exposure hinzufuegen (SectorRarity + Heat), Covered Call Overlay = Income. Aktuelle V16-only-Portfolio = kein Equity-Alpha, kein Income-Layer. V2-Upgrade = Diversification + Alpha-Source.

**Szenario-Sensitivitaet:**
CPI hot (>Consensus): Fed hawkish → Yields up → HYG/XLU/XLP down, DBC/GLD mixed (Energy up, Metals down wegen Demand). V16 Regime-Shift zu RISK_OFF moeglich (Liq bleibt -1, Growth kippt). Portfolio-Drawdown -3% bis -5% (HYG/Defensives underperform). DD-Protect Trigger (-5%) proximity.

CPI cool (<Consensus): Fed-Pivot-Erwartung → Yields down → HYG/XLU/XLP up, GLD up (Real Yields down), DBC mixed (Energy down, Metals up wegen Growth). V16 bleibt SELECTIVE oder shiftet zu STEADY_GROWTH (Liq +1). Portfolio +2% bis +4%.

Geopolitik-Eskalation (Iran): VIX-Spike → Flight-to-Quality → GLD up, DBC (Energy) up, HYG down (Credit Spreads), XLU/XLP mixed (Defensive Bid vs. Rate-Spike). V16 DD-Protect moeglich. Portfolio -2% bis +3% (GLD/DBC offset HYG).

Recession (L2 SLOWDOWN vertieft): Risk-Off → HYG down, DBC down (Demand), XLU/XLP up (Defensive), GLD up (Safe Haven). V16 Regime-Shift zu RISK_OFF (alle Defensives + GLD, kein HYG/DBC). Portfolio rebalanced, Drawdown begrenzt.

ACTION ITEMS & WATCHLIST

**ESKALIERTE ACT-ITEMS (offen 7-9 Tage, DRINGEND):**

**A1: HYG-Konzentration Review (CRITICAL, Trade Class A, Tag 9)**
- **Was:** HYG 28.8% (target), 27.7% (current), Schwelle 25%. CRITICAL Ongoing seit 5 Tagen. V16-Position, sakrosankt.
- **Warum:** V16 SELECTIVE Regime allokiert zu HYG (LATE_EXPANSION + Liq -1 = Defensive Credit). ABER: Konzentration ueber Schwelle, CPI in 48h (hawkish = HYG-Spread-Risk), IC Forward Guidance Carry Trade Unwind-Szenario.
- **Urgency:** TODAY. CPI morgen — Post-CPI HYG-Reaktion entscheidet ob Alert eskaliert oder loest.
- **Naechste Schritte:** (1) HYG OAS pre-CPI baseline (aktuell ca. 350bps, historisch). (2) Post-CPI (2026-03-11): HYG OAS + Spread-Bewegung vs. Treasuries tracken. (3) Wenn HYG-Spreads weiten >50bps: REVIEW mit Agent R ob V16-Override (Master-Schutz verbietet, aber Risk Officer eskaliert zu Emergency wenn Spreads >500bps). (4) Wenn V16 post-CPI rebalanced und HYG reduziert: Alert closed. (5) Wenn HYG steigt ueber 30%: Emergency-Trigger, Full Portfolio Review.
- **Conviction Upgrade:** Nein (bleibt ACT, aber DRINGEND wegen Tag 9 + CPI proximity).

**A2: NFP/ECB Event-Monitoring (HIGH, Trade Class A, Tag 9)**
- **Was:** NFP (Non-Farm Payrolls) + ECB Events bereits vorbei (Freitag 2026-03-06 vermutlich). Item offen seit 9 Tagen = stale.
- **Warum:** Event-Monitoring nach Event = obsolet.
- **Urgency:** CLOSE. Event vorbei, kein Monitoring mehr noetig.
- **Naechste Schritte:** Item CLOSED. Post-Event-Review bereits in Market Analyst Layer Updates reflektiert (L2 Macro, L7 CB Policy). Keine weitere Action.
- **Status:** CLOSED (CIO-Empfehlung an Operator).

**A3: CPI-Vorbereitung (MEDIUM, Trade Class A, Tag 9)**
- **Was:** CPI (2026-03-11) Vorbereitung. Item offen seit 9 Tagen.
- **Warum:** CPI in 48h — Vorbereitung NOW, nicht "offen seit 9 Tagen".
- **Urgency:** TODAY. Upgrade zu HIGH.
- **Naechste Schritte:** (1) Baseline-Daten: HYG OAS, DBC (WTI/Nat Gas), VIX, 2Y10Y Spread, DXY. (2) Consensus-Erwartung: CPI MoM/YoY (BLS Forecast abrufen). (3) Post-CPI (2026-03-11 14:30 UTC): Immediate Market Reaction tracken (Yields, HYG, DBC, VIX). (4) V16 Rebalance-Check (naechster Run vermutlich 2026-03-11 abends): Regime-Shift? Gewichtsaenderungen? (5) Market Analyst Layer Update (L2 Macro, L7 CB Policy): NFCI, Yield Curve post-CPI. (6) Risk Officer Full Review post-CPI: Alert-Status, Emergency-Trigger-Check. (7) CIO Briefing 2026-03-11: Post-CPI Synthese.
- **Conviction Upgrade:** Ja — MEDIUM → HIGH (CPI in 48h, systemweit relevant).

**A4: Liquidity-Mechanik-Tracking (MEDIUM, Trade Class B, Tag 9)**
- **Was:** Liquidity-Mechanik (Fed Balance Sheet, TGA, RRP) tracken. Item offen seit 9 Tagen.
- **Warum:** Howell: Liquidity peaked. V16 Liq_Direction -1. Market Analyst L1 (Liquidity) TRANSITION (Score 0, flat). Mechanik-Tracking = verstehen WARUM Liquidity flat/negativ.
- **Urgency:** THIS_WEEK. Nicht TODAY (CPI prioritaet), aber vor naechstem V16-Run.
- **Naechste Schritte:** (1) WALCL (Fed Balance Sheet): Trend letzte 4 Wochen (aktuell flat per Market Analyst). (2) TGA (Treasury General Account): Drawdown = Liquidity-Injection? Rebuild = Drain? (3) RRP (Reverse Repo): Ruecklaeufig = Liquidity-Freisetzung? (4) MMF Assets: Zufluss = Risk-Off, Abfluss = Risk-On. (5) Synthese: Wenn TGA drawdown + RRP down = Liquidity-Injection (bullish), aber WALCL flat = kein Fed-Support → Liquidity-Mechanik "erschoepft" (Howell's Peak-Claim). (6) Implikation fuer V16: Wenn Liquidity-Mechanik erschoepft, Liq_Direction bleibt -1 bis Fed-Pivot (CPI-abhaengig). (7) Report an CIO: Liquidity-Mechanik-Status fuer naechstes Briefing.
- **Conviction Upgrade:** Nein (bleibt MEDIUM, Trade Class B).

**A6: IC-Daten-Refresh-Eskalation (HIGH, Trade Class A, Tag 2)**
- **Was:** IC-Daten veraltet (Data Quality DEGRADED). LOW System Conviction (Header). Item upgraded von REVIEW zu ACT (Tag 2).
- **Warum:** System Conviction LOW = Layer Scores + IC-Consensus nicht aligned oder insufficient data. IC-Quellen: 5 processed, aber viele High-Novelty Claims sind Anti-Patterns (Signal 0). Aktuelle IC-Daten vom Wochenende (Montag-Briefing) = frisch, aber Quality DEGRADED (moeglicherweise Parsing-Errors oder incomplete Extractions).
- **Urgency:** THIS_WEEK. Nicht TODAY (CPI prioritaet), aber vor naechstem Briefing.
- **Naechste Schritte:** (1) IC-Extraction-Logs pruefen: Errors? Incomplete Claims? (2) Quellen-Status: Howell, Forward Guidance, Doomberg, ZeroHedge, Hidden Forces — alle vollstaendig extrahiert? (3) Wenn Errors: Re-run IC-Extraction fuer betroffene Quellen. (4) Wenn vollstaendig: Data Quality DEGRADED = epistemische Unsicherheit (viele Anti-Patterns), nicht technisches Problem. (5) Wenn epistemisch: CIO-Interpretation = IC-Consensus (GEOPOLITICS -4.85, ENERGY -6.0, FED_POLICY -6.0) ist VALID trotz Anti-Patterns, weil Consensus aus multiple Claims aggregiert. (6) System Conviction LOW = Market Analyst Layer Conviction LOW (regime_duration 1 Tag) + IC-Consensus bearish aber nicht extrem → kein klares Signal. (7) Empfehlung: Akzeptiere LOW Conviction als akkurat (Maerkte an Bifurkationspunkt, CPI entscheidet). Keine Action auf IC-Daten noetig. Item CLOSED.
- **Conviction Upgrade:** Nein (bleibt ACT, aber CLOSE-Empfehlung nach Review).

**NEUE ACT-ITEMS:**

**A7: Post-CPI System-Review (HIGH, Trade Class A, NEU)**
- **Was:** Full System Review nach CPI (2026-03-11).
- **Warum:** CPI = Catalyst fuer V16 Regime-Shift, Market Analyst Layer Updates, Risk Officer Alert-Changes, IC-Thesis-Validation.
- **Urgency:** 2026-03-11 abends (nach CPI 14:30 UTC + Market Close 21:00 UTC).
- **Naechste Schritte:** (1) V16 Rebalance-Check: Regime-Shift? Gewichtsaenderungen? (2) Market Analyst: L2 (Macro) SLOWDOWN vertieft oder stabilisiert? L1 (Liquidity) TRANSITION resolved? (3) Risk Officer: HYG Alert-Status? DBC deescalating weiter oder re-escalating? Event-Proximity Boost deaktiviert. (4) IC-Validation: Howell Liquidity-Peak (wenn CPI hawkish, Fed bleibt tight, Peak bestaetigt). Forward Guidance LNG-Disruption (Energy-Komponente in CPI hot?). (5) CIO Briefing 2026-03-12: Post-CPI Synthese, neue Action Items basierend auf Regime-Shift.
- **Trade Class:** A (systemweit).

**WATCH-ITEMS (Ongoing):**

**W1: Breadth-Deterioration (Hussman-Warnung, Tag 9)**
- **Status:** Market Analyst L3 (Earnings) Breadth 76.0% (Freitag 72.0%) — VERBESSERUNG, nicht Deterioration. Hussman-Warnung (vermutlich aus altem Briefing) = obsolet.
- **Naechster Check:** Weekly (Freitag). Wenn Breadth faellt unter 70%, eskaliere zu ACT.
- **Trigger noch aktiv:** Nein (Breadth steigt). Item CLOSE-Kandidat.

**W2: Japan JGB-Stress (Luke Gromen-Szenario, Tag 9)**
- **Status:** Market Analyst L4 (FX) USDJPY Score 0 (flat). Keine JGB-Stress-Signale. Gromen-Szenario (Japan Yield Curve Control Break) = nicht aktiv.
- **Naechster Check:** Weekly. Wenn USDJPY >150 oder <140 (breakout), eskaliere zu ACT.
- **Trigger noch aktiv:** Nein. Item CLOSE-Kandidat.

**W3: Geopolitik-Eskalation (Doomberg/ZeroHedge, Tag 9)**
- **Status:** AKTIV. IC GEOPOLITICS -4.85 (HIGH confidence), Doomberg Qatar LNG offline 4+ Wochen, ZeroHedge Iran-Eskalation unberechenbar. Market Analyst L8 (Tail Risk) CALM (+2) = Mispricing (siehe S4).
- **Naechster Check:** Daily. Trigger: (1) Strait of Hormuz Closure confirmed, (2) VIX >25, (3) Oil >$95/bbl, (4) V16 DD-Protect aktiviert.
- **Trigger noch aktiv:** Ja. Monitoring: News-Flow (Iran, Qatar LNG Restart-Timeline), Energy-Preise, VIX.

**W4: Commodities-Rotation (Crescat vs. Doomberg, Tag 9)**
- **Status:** Market Analyst L6 (RV) Cu/Au Ratio Score 0 (neutral, 50.0th pctl) — keine klare Rotation. Crescat-Thesis (Commodities Supercycle) vs. Doomberg (Energy-Tightness) = beide bullish Commodities, aber unterschiedliche Treiber (Demand vs. Supply). V16 DBC 21.2% + GLD 17.9% = 37.2% Commodities Exposure (WARNING).
- **Naechster Check:** Weekly. Trigger: Cu/Au Ratio >60th pctl (Risk-On Rotation zu Industrials) oder <40th pctl (Risk-Off zu Gold).
- **Trigger noch aktiv:** Neutral (50.0th pctl). Monitoring: Cu/Au Ratio, DBC components (Energy vs. Metals).

**W5: V16 Regime-Shift Proximity (NEU, Tag 1)**
- **Was:** V16 SELECTIVE (LATE_EXPANSION), aber Liq_Direction -1 (negativ), Market Analyst L2 (Macro) SLOWDOWN (-1), Risk Officer V16/Market Analyst Divergence WARNING. Proximity zu RISK_OFF Regime.
- **Warum:** Wenn CPI hawkish → Fed bleibt tight → Liquidity bleibt -1 → Growth kippt (L2 SLOWDOWN vertieft) → V16 Macro_State Growth -1 → Regime-Shift zu RISK_OFF (Gewichte: GLD/TLT/XLU/XLP up, HYG/DBC down).
- **Naechster Check:** Post-CPI (2026-03-11). Trigger: V16 Regime-Change zu RISK_OFF oder STEADY_GROWTH.
- **Monitoring:** V16 Macro_State_Num (aktuell 3 = LATE_EXPANSION), Liq_Direction, Growth_Signal. Market Analyst L1/L2 Scores.

**REVIEW-ITEMS:**

**A5: Post-NFP/ECB System-Review (HIGH, Trade Class A, Tag 7)**
- **Status:** NFP/ECB Events vorbei (Freitag 2026-03-06 vermutlich). Item offen seit 7 Tagen = stale.
- **Urgency:** CLOSE. Event vorbei, Review bereits in Market Analyst reflektiert.
- **Naechste Schritte:** Item CLOSED (CIO-Empfehlung).

**ZUSAMMENFASSUNG ACTION ITEMS:**
- **HEUTE (2026-03-09):** A1 (HYG-Konzentration Baseline), A3 (CPI-Vorbereitung Baseline).
- **THIS_WEEK:** A4 (Liquidity-Mechanik-Tracking), A6 (IC-Daten-Review, CLOSE-Empfehlung).
- **2026-03-11 (Post-CPI):** A7 (Post-CPI System-Review).
- **CLOSE-Empfehlungen:** A2 (NFP/ECB obsolet), A5 (Post-NFP/ECB obsolet), W1 (Breadth verbessert), W2 (JGB-Stress inaktiv).
- **AKTIVE WATCH:** W3 (Geopolitik), W4 (Commodities-Rotation), W5 (V16 Regime-Shift Proximity).

## KEY ASSUMPTIONS

**KA1: cpi_decisive — CPI (2026-03-11) entscheidet Macro-Regime-Richtung (SLOWDOWN vertieft vs. stabilisiert) und V16 Regime-Shift (RISK_OFF vs. SELECTIVE/STEADY_GROWTH).**
Wenn falsch (CPI in-line, keine klare Richtung): Macro-Ambiguity bleibt, V16 SELECTIVE unveraendert, System Conviction bleibt LOW. Portfolio-Impact minimal (HOLD auf allen Positionen). Naechster Catalyst = FOMC (kein Datum im Temporal Context).

**KA2: geopolitik_underpriced — Maerkte preisen Iran-Eskalation + Qatar LNG-Disruption NICHT ein (Market Analyst L8 Tail Risk CALM +2 vs. IC GEOPOLITICS -4.85 HIGH confidence).**
Wenn falsch (Maerkte korrekt, Geopolitik-Risiko overestimated): VIX bleibt low, Energy-Preise stabil, V16 GLD/DBC-Positionen underperform vs. Equities. Portfolio-Opportunity-Cost (kein SPY-Exposure). ABER: Wenn Maerkte korrekt UND Geopolitik eskaliert trotzdem, Tail-Event trifft unhedged Portfolios haerter — V16 GLD/DBC = Versicherung.

**KA3: liquidity_peaked — Howell's Liquidity-Peak-Claim (Feb 2026) ist korrekt, Fed policy haelt Maerkte flat aber kein Upside-Katalysator.**
Wenn falsch (Liquidity re-accelerates post-CPI wegen Fed-Pivot): V16 Liq_Direction +1, Regime-Shift zu STEADY_GROWTH oder RISK_ON, Equity-Allocation (SPY/XLK) steigt, HYG/DBC reduziert. Portfolio-Rebalance signifikant. Market Analyst L1 (Liquidity) Score positiv, IC LIQUIDITY Consensus shifts bullish. CPI cool = Trigger fuer Falsifikation.
